name: Marketing — Fractional Ownership
description: Public marketing landing page for a fractional ownership platform. Explains tokenized investing, trust signals, and drives visitors to sign up and browse assets.

page_briefs.home: Conversion-focused marketing home. Split hero combines headline, subheadline, and primary sign-up CTA with a product visual of the asset browser. Features block highlights pillars like fractional access, liquid markets, and governance. How-it-works walks through three to four numbered steps from browsing to owning. Testimonials carry investor quotes and trust logos, and a final CTA section closes with a full-width sign-up band.

shells.top-nav-footer: Public marketing shell with top navigation and full footer
